_doc: Calibration fixtures for the reachability CONSUMER detector — captured-incident text with STABLE ground truth (NOT live routes, which churn as other lanes wire them — that's the burn-down's job, not calibration's). Each fixture is a controlled (fe, tests) snippet + the route + expected_orphan. These capture the false-wire incident as a permanent regression case: a comment-mention / existence-assertion / prose-in-string must read ORPHAN; a real fetch/EventSource/HTTP call must read WIRED. The detector's LOGIC is scored against these — stable forever, immune to the live tree changing.

fixtures.fe: // RETIRED: /api/delta is no longer called by this surface

fixtures.tests: print('the /api/zeta path cleans the reply before speak')
